_comment: Real-world Tauri apps used to re-verify Victauri compatibility against the CURRENT version.
SHAs were captured 2026-06-03 from each repo's default-branch HEAD; bump them deliberately so a retest is reproducible.

NOTE: these apps evolve — several have restructured since Victauri's original 2026-05 compatibility run (e.g. Lettura is now a pnpm monorepo; package managers differ: yarn/pnpm/bun). tauri_dir, frontend_build, and package_manager below reflect each repo's state at the pinned SHA.

frontend_build runs from the repo root and MUST populate the tauri.conf frontendDist directory BEFORE the debug cargo build — debug binaries embed frontendDist at compile time (no dev server is used here).
package_manager tells the compat workflow which toolchain to provision (corepack covers pnpm + yarn; bun is installed separately).

apps.name: Kanri
apps.frontend_build: corepack enable && yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn generate

apps.name: En Croissant
apps.frontend_build: corepack enable && pnpm install && pnpm build-vite

apps.name: Duckling
apps.frontend_build: corepack enable && pnpm install && pnpm build

apps.name: Lettura
apps.frontend_build: corepack enable && pnpm install && pnpm -C apps/desktop build
